//: Ruflo / Claude Flow orchestration + BlenderMCP for Towerpolis. Activate by opening Claude Code in this repo (Node 20+). claude-flow = the swarm/memory/coordination tools the agents reference (mcp__claude-flow__*); run `npx claude-flow@v3alpha doctor` once. ruv-swarm = optional extra topologies. blender = ahujasid/blender-mcp: lets Claude drive Blender to model the blocks; needs `uv` installed (uvx) + the BlenderMCP addon installed & connected inside a RUNNING Blender (3.6+). See docs/BLENDER_GUIDE.md and docs/AGENT_ORCHESTRATION.md.
